name: CDIF Enumeration Domain
abstract: Extension point that documents a codification vocabulary as an enumerated value domain. Composes schemaorg/identifier, skos/skosConceptScheme (or id-reference) for schema:inDefinedTermSet, and the InternationalString datatype for cdi:purpose. Local $defs cover AuthorizationSource, Category, CategoryPosition, CategorySet, ClassificationItem, Level, LevelStructure, Notation, and TypedString. Composes building blocks: schemaorgProperties/identifier, skosProperties/skosConceptScheme, ddiCDIFProperties/ddi-cdif-data-types, ddiCDIFProperties/ddi-cdif-agent.
